# Harjit Singh — Senior iOS Developer

> Senior iOS Developer with 7+ years of specialised experience building production native iOS applications in Swift and SwiftUI, with 2+ years of concurrent Flutter development. Expert in MVVM/VIPER architectures, real-time on-device ML pipelines (CoreML, Vision), and end-to-end App Store delivery. Available for contract and full-time iOS engineering engagements.

- Name: Harjit Singh
- Title: Senior iOS Developer
- Location: Mohali, India (open to Canada and remote)
- Experience: 7+ years building production iOS apps
- Primary stack: Swift, SwiftUI, UIKit, CoreML, Vision, Combine, MVVM, VIPER
- Secondary stack: Flutter (Dart, BLoC), Python, pandas, SQL
- Shipped on the App Store: Filament Bible, Suuz
- Education: Bow Valley College (Calgary, Canada) — Data Management & Analytics, GPA 3.9/4.0; MCA + BSc IT from Lovely Professional University
- Contact: bhatt.harjit@gmail.com · +91 98149 73332
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/singh-harjit
- GitHub: https://github.com/harjit8016
- Medium: https://medium.com/@bhatt.harjit

## Hire / availability

Available for: contract iOS engagements, Senior iOS Developer / Tech Lead roles, App Store delivery, native iOS modernization (UIKit → SwiftUI), CoreML/Vision pipelines, real-time networking (Socket.IO, DoIP), and Flutter cross-platform projects with native iOS bridging.
